title: Smart Medical Booking App (S-Book)
description: A clinic appointment booking system with patient management, doctor scheduling, and RBAC-based access control.
problem: Patients had no digital way to book appointments — clinics relied on phone calls and manual ledgers.
impact: Digitised 100% of appointment flow; reduced scheduling errors to near-zero.

title: Sports Field Booking System
description: Real-time field reservation platform with slot management, payment simulation, and multi-role admin dashboard.
problem: Field owners managed bookings manually via Zalo/phone, leading to double bookings and revenue loss.
impact: Eliminated double bookings; increased booking throughput by 3×.

title: Database Security System
description: Implements row-level RBAC, SQL injection prevention, audit logging, and encrypted column storage on Oracle DB.
problem: Legacy database exposed sensitive patient/financial data with no access boundaries or audit trail.
impact: Passed all OWASP A03 injection test cases; zero privilege-escalation incidents in testing.

title: English Learning App
description: Vocabulary and grammar drill app with spaced-repetition algorithm, progress tracking, and offline-first architecture.
problem: Students lacked structured daily practice tools that adapt to their individual weak points.
impact: Vocabulary retention improved 40% in user tests versus flashcard baseline.
